title: AI Headshots
shortDescription: Studio-quality headshots from your phone. No photographer, no studio, no awkward poses.
longDescription: Get 40+ professional headshots in under an hour. Upload 10–15 selfies, our AI generates corporate, creative, casual, and outdoor looks — all in your style, with your face. Perfect for LinkedIn, your website, business cards, speaker bios, or just because you deserve a good photo. Delivered in 3 different outfits, 3 backgrounds, and 2 expressions.
bestFor: LinkedIn, business cards, websites, speaker bios, dating apps

title: Dating Profile Photos
shortDescription: Photos that actually get matches. Optimized for Hinge, Bumble, Tinder, and every other app.
longDescription: Stop swiping with bad bathroom selfies. Get 30+ AI-generated dating photos that show who you actually are — your smile, your vibe, your energy. Optimized by what works in 2026 dating app data: natural light, real expressions, eye contact, full-body shots, and one great group photo for social proof.
whatYouGet: Mix of close-ups, full-body, and lifestyle
Style guide: which photos lead with
bestFor: Hinge, Bumble, Tinder, Match, eHarmony, Bumble BFF

title: Professional LinkedIn Photos
shortDescription: A LinkedIn headshot that gets you noticed. Recruiters spend 0.2 seconds — make it count.
longDescription: Your LinkedIn photo is your digital first impression. Get a polished, professional headshot that conveys competence, warmth, and approachability. The kind of photo that makes recruiters reach out, clients trust you, and connections accept. Background-blurred, well-lit, natural smile, business-casual attire generated to fit your style.
bestFor: LinkedIn, company about pages, conference bios

title: Wedding Outfits & Try-Ons
shortDescription: See yourself in 50 wedding looks before you buy. Try on dresses, suits, and traditions virtually.
longDescription: Choosing your wedding outfit is a decision. Get a personalized AI lookbook with 50+ options — white dresses, traditional attire, modern suits, cultural variations (including West African aso-ebi, Indian lehenga, Chinese qipao, Nigerian Igbo bride, Ghanaian kente). See yourself in each before the first fitting. Share with your wedding party for votes.

title: Graduation Photos
shortDescription: Graduation photos that don't look like a high-school yearbook. Cinematic, editorial, you.
longDescription: You did the work. Get photos that match. Cinematic graduation portraits in your cap and gown, on campus, in the studio, on the field, at the family home. Multiple backgrounds, lighting styles, and group shots. Add your school colors, your honors stole, your culture. From HBCU to Ivy League, we match the vibe.
whatYouGet: Solo, family, and friend group shots
bestFor: High school, college, graduate school, professional school graduations

title: Travel Photos
shortDescription: Post the trip without taking the trip. Cinematic travel photos from anywhere in the world.
longDescription: Dreaming of Santorini? Tokyo? Lagos? Bali? Get a personalized set of travel photos with YOU in them — at iconic locations around the world. shortDescription: Adorable AI baby photos and pregnancy announcements. No professional shoot required.

shortDescription: The family photo you keep meaning to take. All of you, looking great, finally.
longDescription: The whole family, in one frame, looking good. AI-generated family portraits in settings you choose: living room, beach, garden, holiday scene, or studio. Up to 8 family members.
